testcase.name: test_upload_64x64_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5.py:178: in test_upload_64x64_succeeds assert r.status_code == 200, f"expected 200 for 64x64 PNG, got {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: expected 200 for 64x64 PNG, got 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
